group_1.textRight: Pardon me for coming in the back door.

group_1.textLeft: Oh my, Nagitan?@I thought you had today off.

group_1.textRight: I'm here to discuss my shifts.
I'm a bit tied up with things at home,
so I won't be able to come to work@for the next few days...
I'm deeply sorry for the inconvenience...

group_1.textLeft: You know, that could've been an email...
...Is something wrong?

group_1.textRight: Perhaps it's only my imagination...
But was that a sigh of relief, madam?

group_1.textLeft: [chara:800700:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!
N-not in the least.
You're a real asset to us, and you won't be around@to help.

group_1.textRight: I see... The neighboring cafe had a sign saying@that they were closed, so...
I suspect our cafe will be busy for a while.
Nevertheless, my apologies once again that@I will be unable to help out.

group_1.textLeft: Don't worry about it.

group_1.textRight: Do you have a moment, Nagitan?
...How do I put this, um... Our cafe has been@receiving threats for a while now...!

group_1.textLeft: What...?!
Why? From whom?

group_1.textRight: I feel like Madam was trying to keep quiet about it,@but...

group_1.textLeft: (There's the name of that group again...!)
(Yakumo told me about them... They're the ones@who attacked my younger brother yesterday...!)
But why would they target our cafe...?
This affects Madam as well.
If she's going through such a hard time,@why did she not tell us...?
...[wait:1.0][chara:101601:motion_000][chara:101601:cheek_0][chara:101601:face_mtn_ex_030.exp.json][chara:101601:lipSynch_1]Ah, right.@Because the motive behind the raid is...

group_1.textCenter: No, I bet it was the last election.@It made the East look awful.
Well, the company gave me a call.
That said, you probably shouldn't be so open about@your home life.

group_1.textLeft: It's all because I'm from Daito Ward...!

group_1.textRight: No, it's still not your fault, Nagitan.

group_1.textLeft: How so...?

group_1.textRight: It's true that since the election,
we've been facing threats to not hire anyone@from Daito...
Madam rejects all of that, though.
Nobody knows you're from Daito yet...
But at other cafes where girls HAVE@been found out...

group_1.textLeft: You can't be serious! The cafe that shut down...@that was an attack...?!

group_1.textRight: So please!@I'm not asking you to leave the cafe!
But you MUSTN'T tell anyone where you're from...!

group_1.textLeft: ...[wait:1.0][chara:101601:motion_100][chara:101601:cheek_0][chara:101601:face_mtn_ex_010.exp.json][chara:101601:lipSynch_1]Yes, of course. I promise.
Why are you crying...?

group_1.textRight: 'Cause...
I feel horrible for having to ask you to do that...
I'm so sorry...

group_1.textLeft: Why are you apologizing when I'm the one@who brought it up...?
...Well, I suppose I was the one who made you@have to tell me something that difficult...
Thank you.
I think this may have been my last straw.
Now then...I'll be off.
...[wait:1.0][chara:101601:cheek_0][chara:101601:face_mtn_ex_020.exp.json][chara:101601:lipSynch_1]It's time for me to take matters@into my own hands.
